events.title: Best of the Northwest Spring Art Show
events.venue: Hangar 30 at Magnuson Park, 6310 NE 74th St, Seattle
events.description: 37th Annual Spring Show - Seattle's premier fine art and craft show featuring over 100 talented artists, special exhibits and food trucks.

events.title: Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival
events.venue: Seattle Center, 305 Harrison St, Seattle
events.description: Celebrates Seattle's friendship with Japan and Japan's gift of 1000 cherry trees in 1976. Enjoy Japanese art, dance, music, martial arts, and food in the Armory, at Fisher Pavilion, and on Fisher Stage.

events.title: Yuri's Night - Space Party
events.venue: Museum of Flight, 9404 E Marginal Way S, Seattle
events.description: Celebrate the first man to orbit the earth in 1961 at this space-themed spectacle that transforms the Museum of Flight into an intergalactic nightclub with electronic DJ music, lighted art, drinks, and food trucks. Age 21+.
